title: Job Opening Category Manager at Park Avenue Global Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Park Avenue Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Park Avenue Global Group! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Park Avenue Global Group:
Park Avenue Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue Global Group!
